title: PodmanPy Containers and system areas of concern
body:
PodmanPy Containers and system areas of concern

    * Implement most containers and system calls
    * Pylint run on all new code
    * Updates to code and unittests

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
A couple of nits that can be ignored or updated later if you wish.
LGTM
